    Index

    A C D E G H I M N O P R S T X 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    amount - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair
    The amount value, representing the quantity associated with the event (e.g., the number of items dropped).
    amountedDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Map for drops with variable amounts, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and min/max amount.
    amountedSelectiveDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Map for drop groups with variable amounts, where each group has a set chance to drop and each ItemStack has an associated min/max amount, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.
    applySkin(Mannequin, SkinData) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    Applies the given skin data to the provided mannequin entity, setting the appropriate profile and texture properties based on the skin data.
    attackCooldown - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    The cooldown time between attacks for this entity, in seconds.
    attackRange - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    The range within which this entity can attack targets, in blocks.
    attackTarget() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Attacks the current target if within range and cooldown allows.

    C

    chance - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair
    The chance value, typically a float between 0 and 1, representing the probability of an event occurring (e.g., an item drop).
    chance - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceMinMaxPair
    The chance value, typically a float between 0 and 1, representing the probability of an event occurring (e.g., an item drop).
    ChanceAmountPair - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    A simple data class that pairs a chance value with an amount, used for defining drops and other chance-based mechanics in the NoorEntities plugin.
    ChanceAmountPair(float, int) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair
    Creates a new ChanceAmountPair instance with the given chance and amount values.
    ChanceMinMaxPair - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    A simple data class that pairs a chance value with a min/max pair, used for defining drops and other chance-based mechanics.
    ChanceMinMaxPair(float, int, int) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceMinMaxPair
    Creates a new ChanceMinMaxPair instance with the given chance, min, and max values.
    checkForTargets() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Searches for nearby players to set as a target for the AI.
    com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities - package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
     
    com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai - package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai
     
    com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity - package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity
     
    com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile - package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile
     
    customDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Map for basic custom drops, where each ItemStack has an associated chance and fixed amount.

    D

    damage - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    The amount of damage this entity deals when attacking.
    defaultAi - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    The default AI class to be instantiated for this entity type when spawned.
    dropsInitialized - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Flag to ensure that drops are only initialized once.
    DumbEntity - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity
    Abstract base class for custom entities without a default AI.
    DumbEntity(JavaPlugin, String, EntityType, Class) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    Creates a new Entity instance with the given plugin, ID, entity type, and AI.
    DumbEntity(JavaPlugin, String, EntityType, Component, Class) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    Creates a new Entity instance with the given plugin, ID, entity type, and AI.

    E

    Entity - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity
    Abstract base class for generic custom entities.
    Entity(JavaPlugin, String, EntityType) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Creates a new Entity instance with the given plugin, ID, and entity type.
    Entity(JavaPlugin, String, EntityType, Component) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Creates a new Entity instance with the given plugin, ID, and entity type.
    EntityAI - Interface in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai
    Interface for AI-controlled entities in the game.
    entityType - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    The Bukkit EntityType that this custom entity will spawn as.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    G

    getAttackCooldown() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    Gets the attack cooldown for this entity, which determines how long the entity must wait between attacks.
    getAttackRange() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    Gets the attack range for this entity, which determines how close a target must be for the entity to attack.
    getCooldownRemaining() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Returns the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack again.
    getCooldownRemaining() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Gets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack again.
    getDamage() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    Gets the damage dealt by this entity when attacking.
    getEntities() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.Plugin
    Returns a collection of all loaded entities in the plugin.
    getEntity() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Returns the custom entity associated with this AI.
    getEntity() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Gets the mob type this AI instance is controlling.
    getEntityName() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Gets the display name for this entity, or null if no custom name is set.
    getId() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Gets the unique identifier for this entity type, used for persistence and identification.
    getInstance() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Returns the Bukkit LivingEntity instance for this AI.
    getInstance() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Gets the Bukkit entity instance this AI is controlling.
    getInstance() - Static method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.Plugin
    Returns the singleton instance of the Plugin class, allowing other classes to access the plugin instance for tasks such as logging, configuration management, and scheduling tasks.
    getRange() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Returns the AI's detection/interaction range.
    getRange() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Gets the aggro range for this AI, determining how far it can detect and target players.
    getSkinData() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    Gets the skin data for this humanoid entity, which includes the texture and profile information used to apply custom skins to the mannequin when it spawns.
    getTarget(Entity) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Gets the current target of this entity, if any.
    Gnome - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile
    Gnome entity class
    Gnome(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile.Gnome
    Creates a new Gnome entity instance with the given plugin.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    HostileAI - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai
    Hostile AI implementation
    HostileAI(DumbEntity, LivingEntity) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Creates a new HostileAI instance for the given entity and its Bukkit instance.
    HumanoidEntity - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity
     
    HumanoidEntity(JavaPlugin, String, Class) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    Creates a new HumanoidEntity instance with the given plugin, ID, and default AI.
    HumanoidEntity(JavaPlugin, String, Component, Class) - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    Creates a new HumanoidEntity instance with the given plugin, ID, and default AI.

    I

    id - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Unique identifier for this entity type, used for persistence and identification.
    initDrops() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Initializes the drops for this entity.
    initDrops() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile.Gnome
    Initializes the drops for the Gnome entity.
    isEntity(Entity) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Checks if the given Bukkit entity is an instance of this custom entity type.
    isTargetEntity(Entity) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Checks if the given entity is controlled by this AI.

    M

    max - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceMinMaxPair
    The maximum amount value, representing the upper bound of the quantity associated with the event (e.g., the maximum number of items dropped).
    min - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceMinMaxPair
    The minimum amount value, representing the lower bound of the quantity associated with the event (e.g., the minimum number of items dropped).

    N

    name - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    The custom name to display for this entity, or null for no custom name.
    newAmountedDrop(ItemStack, int, int) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount.
    newAmountedDrop(ItemStack, int, int, float) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount.
    newAmountedSelectiveDrop(List, List, List, List) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount.
    newAmountedSelectiveDrop(List, List, List, List, float) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and variable amount.
    newDrop(ItemStack) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and amount.
    newDrop(ItemStack, float) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and amount.
    newDrop(ItemStack, float, int) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop to this entity's drop table with the specified chance and amount.
    newSelectiveDrop(List, List) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance.
    newSelectiveDrop(List, List, List) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance.
    newSelectiveDrop(List, List, List, float) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Adds a custom drop set to this entity's drop table with the specified chance.

    O

    onCommand(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.PingPlugin
     
    onCommand(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SpawnCommand
     
    onCommand(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.TestCommand
     
    onDeath(EntityDeathEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Override to handle AI-specific death logic.
    onDeath(EntityDeathEvent) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Handles the EntityDeathEvent for this entity, automatically applying the custom drops defined in the drop tables.
    onDisable() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.Plugin
    Called when the plugin is disabled.
    onEnable() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.Plugin
    Called when the plugin is enabled.
    onEntityDeath(EntityDeathEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Called when the AI entity dies.
    onEntityHit(EntityDamageByEntityEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Called when the AI entity deals damage to another entity.
    onEntityHurt(EntityDamageByEntityEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Called when the AI entity takes damage.
    onEntitySpawn(EntitySpawnEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Called when an entity spawns.
    onHit(EntityDamageByEntityEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Override to handle AI-specific hit logic.
    onHurt(EntityDamageByEntityEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Override to handle AI-specific hurt logic.
    onHurt(EntityDamageByEntityEvent) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Sets the AI's target to the damager when the entity is hurt.
    onSpawn(EntitySpawnEvent) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Override to handle AI-specific spawn logic.
    onTabComplete(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SpawnTabCompleter
     
    onTick() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Called every tick.
    onTick() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Checks for nearby targets, rotates towards them, and attacks if possible.

    P

    PingPlugin - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    Command executor for the /ping command, which allows players with the "noorpc.admin.panel" permission to check if the NoorEntities plugin is running.
    PingPlugin() - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.PingPlugin
     
    plugin - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    The plugin instance for registering events and accessing server resources.
    Plugin - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    The main plugin class for NoorEntities, responsible for loading entity classes, registering commands, and managing the plugin lifecycle.
    Plugin() - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.Plugin
     

    R

    reloadPlugin() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.Plugin
    Reloads the plugin by reloading the configuration and re-registering commands.
    removeTarget(Entity) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Removes the target for this entity.
    resetCooldown() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Resets the AI's attack cooldown to the entity's default value.
    rotateTowardsTarget() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Rotates the AI entity to face its current target.

    S

    selectiveDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Map for drop groups, where each group has a set chance to drop, and within the group each ItemStack has its own amount and drop weight within the set.
    setAggroRange(double) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Sets the aggro range for this AI, determining how far it can detect and target players.
    setCooldownRemaining(float) - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Sets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack.
    setCooldownRemaining(float) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.HostileAI
    Sets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack again.
    setTarget(Entity, Entity) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Sets the target for this entity to attack or interact with.
    skinData - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    The skin data for this humanoid entity, including texture and profile information.
    SkinData - Record Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    A simple data class that holds skin information for humanoid entities in the NoorEntities plugin.
    SkinData(String, UUID, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Creates an instance of a SkinData record class.
    skinDisplayName() - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Returns the value of the skinDisplayName record component.
    skinProfileId() - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Returns the value of the skinProfileId record component.
    skinTextureSignature() - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Returns the value of the skinTextureSignature record component.
    skinTextureValue() - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Returns the value of the skinTextureValue record component.
    spawn(Location) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.DumbEntity
    Adds AI and Spawns an instance of this custom entity at the given location.
    spawn(Location) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    Spawns an instance of this custom entity at the given location.
    spawn(Location) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Hostile.Gnome
    Spawns the Gnome entity at the given location.
    spawn(Location) - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    Applies skin, Adds AI and Spawns an instance of this custom entity at the given location.
    SpawnCommand - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    Command executor for the /spawn command, which allows players with the "noorpc.admin.panel" permission to spawn entities.
    SpawnCommand() - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SpawnCommand
     
    SpawnTabCompleter - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    Tab completer for the /spawn command, providing suggestions for entity IDs and coordinates based on the player's current location.
    SpawnTabCompleter() - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SpawnTabCompleter
     

    T

    TestCommand - Class in com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities
    Command executor for the /test command, this command is used for testing purposes and will change frequently.
    TestCommand() - Constructor for class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.TestCommand
     
    tickHandler() - Method in interface com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai.EntityAI
    Starts a repeating task that ticks the AI logic every server tick.
    toString() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceAmountPair
    Returns a string representation of this ChanceAmountPair, formatted as "(chance, amount)".
    toString() - Method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ChanceMinMaxPair
    Returns a string representation of this ChanceMinMaxPair, formatted as "(chance, min-max)".
    toString() - Method in record class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toValidProfileName(String, UUID) - Static method in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.HumanoidEntity
    Converts a display name into a valid Minecraft profile name, which must be 16 characters or fewer and can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.

    X

    xpDrops - Variable in class com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.entity.Entity
    The amount of experience to drop when this entity dies.
